languages.text: {n}Лицо капитана озаряется внутренним светом.{/n} "Всю жизнь готовилась к этому, Лорд-капитан!"
{n}The captain's face beams with an inner light.{/n} "I've been preparing for this my whole life, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: {n}Лицо капитана озаряется внутренним светом.{/n} "Всю жизнь готовилась к этому, Лорд-капитан!"

traits.locale_text: {n}An inner light shines across the captain's face.{/n} "I've been preparing for this my whole life, Lord Captain!"
{n}The captain's face beams with an inner light.{/n} "I've been preparing for this my whole life, Lord Captain!"
{n}The captain's face breaks into a broad smile.{/n} "I've been preparing for this my whole life, Lord Captain!"
{n}An inner light shines across the captain's face.{/n} "I've been preparing for this my whole life, Lord Captain!"
{n}The captain's face beams with an inner light.{/n} "I've been preparing for this my whole life, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: {n}船長の顔に満面の笑みが広がる。{/n}「この日のために、一生をかけて備えてきました、ロードキャプテン！」
languages.original_text: {n}The captain's face breaks into a broad smile.{/n} "I've been preparing for this my whole life, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: {n}船長の顔に満面の笑みが広がる。{/n}「この日のために、一生をかけて備えてきました、ロードキャプテン！」

languages.text: {n}Un sourire comblé illumine le visage de la capitaine.{/n} « Je m'y suis préparée toute ma vie, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The captain's face beams with an inner light.{/n} "I've been preparing for this my whole life, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Un sourire comblé illumine le visage de la capitaine.{/n} « Je m'y suis préparée toute ma vie, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »

languages.text: {n}Yüzbaşının yüzüne parlıyor.{/n} "Bütün hayatım boyunca buna hazırlandım Lord Kaptan!"
languages.original_text: {n}The captain's face beams with an inner light.{/n} "I've been preparing for this my whole life, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Yüzbaşının yüzüne parlıyor.{/n} "Bütün hayatım boyunca buna hazırlandım Lord Kaptan!"

languages.text: {n}Das Gesicht des Captains erstrahlt mit einem inneren Licht.{/n} "Darauf habe ich mich mein ganzes Leben vorbereitet, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: {n}The captain's face beams with an inner light.{/n} "I've been preparing for this my whole life, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Gesicht des Captains erstrahlt mit einem inneren Licht.{/n} "Darauf habe ich mich mein ganzes Leben vorbereitet, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: {n}La cara de la capitana brilla con luz propia.{/n} «¡Me he estado preparando para esto toda mi vida, Lord Capitán!».
languages.original_text: {n}The captain's face beams with an inner light.{/n} "I've been preparing for this my whole life, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La cara de la capitana brilla con luz propia.{/n} «¡Me he estado preparando para esto toda mi vida, Lord Capitán!».

languages.text: {n}上尉的脸上透出发自内心的喜悦。{/n}“我毕生都在为此做准备，舰长大人！”
